markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content, reporting, and a new feature communication process.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Feature Process:** A new process will use a master feature list (from Otto's codebase) to ensure content accuracy and enable a quarterly refresh of all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Publishing Guardrail:** GrowthX will confirm its CMS publishing process is isolated from the main site to prevent accidentally pushing Otto's unfinished staging changes live before the Monday afternoon launch.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Strong Early Performance:** Key metrics are trending up, with impressions growing, keywords ranking, and LLM answer quality improving (from 65% to 85% average top-position rate).](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Reporting Expansion:** Monthly deep-dive meetings will begin, and Looker will integrate Otto's GA conversion goals to provide a full-funnel view of content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

## Topics

### Content & Publishing

  - [**Backlog:** A healthy content backlog is approved, providing a runway for prioritization based on relevance and topic cluster coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [**Delivery:** Three articles are staged for delivery today/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [**Publishing Guardrail:** GrowthX will confirm its CMS publishing process is isolated from the main site.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To prevent accidentally pushing Otto's unfinished staging changes live before the Monday afternoon launch.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

### Feature Communication & Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** Content was using overly specific, potentially outdated details (e.g., "flight monitoring every 30 seconds").](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new process will use a master feature list to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Source:** Jason will provide the file from Otto's codebase that defines the AI agent's capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Implementation:** GrowthX will add a pipeline step to validate content against this list, creating a single source of truth.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Process for New Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
    1.  [**Centralized Updates:** Use a shared Notion doc for real-time feature updates.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
    2.  [**SEO Validation:** Research search intent for new features to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
    3.  [**Content Refresh:** Schedule a quarterly refresh of all articles to integrate new features.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### Reporting & Performance

  - [**Looker Dashboard:** Being updated to align with topic clusters; data may be temporarily incomplete today/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [**Monthly Deep Dive:** Jacob will lead a monthly reporting deep dive, integrated into an existing weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Performance Snapshot:**](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**Impressions:** Trending up-and-to-the-right.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**Keyword Ranking:** Growing daily with relevant keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**LLM Answer Quality:**](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
          - [**Share:** Up from 7% to 8% last week.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
          - [**Position:** Average top-position rate improved from 65% to \~85% last week.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**Competitor Citations:** Dropped \~30% last week.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
          - [**Hypothesis:** May be a temporary effect of the recent ChatGPT 5.1 update.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking:** Looker will integrate Otto's Google Analytics conversion goals (e.g., app sign-ups) to provide a full-funnel view.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Confirm CMS publishing is isolated from the main site.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Add the master feature list to writing guidelines and the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [Schedule the first monthly reporting deep dive with Jacob.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Provide the master feature list file from Otto's codebase.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [Set up conversion tracking in Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/G7t1_FXMFsJBshMXqbASfeUp5992TApx?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
